nasb.text: So all the army of the Chaldeans who were with the captain of the guard broke down the walls around Jerusalem.

esv.text: And all the army of the Chaldeans, who were with the captain of the guard, broke down the walls around Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 跟隨護衛長的迦勒底人全軍拆毀了耶路撒冷周圍的城牆。

ccb.text: 他率领的迦勒底军队拆毁了耶路撒冷四围的城墙。
